Description: Search your deck for a Pokémon-GX, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Coach Trainer
Description: Draw 2 cards. If your Active Pokémon is a TAG TEAM Pokémon, draw 2 more cards.

Name: Dark City
Description: Basic [D] Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Retreat Cost.

Name: Ear-Ringing Bell
Description: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is your Active Pokémon and is damaged by an opponent's attack (even if that Pokémon is Knocked Out), the Attacking Pokémon is now Confused.

Name: Flyinium Z: Air Slash
Description: If the Pokémon this card is attached to has the Air Slash attack, it can use the GX attack on this card. (You still need the necessary Energy to use this attack.)[C][C][C][C] Speeding Skystrike GX 180Prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)CCCC        Attack 1 180

Name: Giant Bomb
Description: If this card is attached to 1 of your Pokémon, discard it at the end of your opponent's turn. If the Pokémon this card is attached to is your Active Pokémon and takes 180 or more damage from an opponent's attack (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), put 10 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon.

Name: Giant Hearth
Description: Once during each player's turn, that player may discard a card from their hand. If they do, that player searches their deck for up to 2 [R] Energy cards, reveals them, and puts them into their hand. Then, that player shuffles their deck.

Name: Great Potion
Description: Heal 50 damage from your Active Pokémon-GX.

Name: Grimsley
Description: Move up to 3 damage counters from 1 of your opponent's Pokémon to another of their Pokémon.

Name: Hapu
Description: Look at the top 6 cards of your deck and put 2 of them into your hand. Discard the other cards.

Name: Karate Belt
Description: If you have more Prize cards remaining than your opponent, the attacks of the Pokémon this card is attached to cost [F] less.

Name: Misty's Favor
Description: Search your deck for up to 3 Supporter cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Normalium Z: Tackle
Description: If the Pokémon this card is attached to has the Tackle attack, it can use the GX attack on this card. (You still need the necessary Energy to use this attack.)[C][C][C][C] Barreling Blitz GX 200+Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 40 more damage for each heads. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)CCCC        Attack 1 200+

Name: Poké Maniac
Description: Search your deck for up to 3 Pokémon that have a Retreat Cost of exactly 4, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Pokémon Research Lab
Description: Once during each player's turn, that player may search their deck for up to 2 Pokémon that evolve from Unidentified Fossil, put those Pokémon onto their Bench, and shuffle their deck. If a player searches their deck in this way, their turn ends.

Name: Reset Stamp
Description: Your opponent shuffles their hand into their deck and draws a card for each of their remaining Prize cards.

Name: Reset Stamp
Description: Your opponent shuffles their hand into their deck and draws a card for each of their remaining Prize cards.

Name: Slumbering Forest
Description: If a Pokémon is Asleep, its owner flips 2 coins instead of 1 for that Special Condition between turns. If either of them is tails, that Pokémon is still Asleep.

Name: Stadium Nav
Description: Flip 2 coins. For each heads, search your deck for a Stadium card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Tag Switch
Description: Move up to 2 Energy from 1 of your TAG TEAM Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

Name: Unidentified Fossil
Description: Play this card as if it were a 60-HP [C] Basic Pokémon. At any time during your turn (before your attack), you may discard this card from play. This card can't retreat.

Name: U-Turn Board
Description: The Retreat Cost of the Pokémon this card is attached to is [C] less. If this card is discarded from play, put it into your hand instead of the discard pile.

Name: Recycle Energy
Description: This card provides [C] Energy. If this card is discarded from play, put it into your hand instead of the discard pile.

Name: Weakness Guard Energy
Description: This card provides [C] Energy. The Pokémon this card is attached to has no Weakness.

Name: Rowlet & Alolan Exeggutor-GX
Effects: Search your deck for a card that evolves from 1 of your [G] Pokémon and put it onto that Pokémon to evolve it. If that Pokémon is now a Stage 1 Pokémon, search your deck for a Stage 2 Pokémon that evolves from that Pokémon and put it onto that Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck.
Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

If this Pokémon has at least 3 extra Energy attached to it (in addition to this attack's cost), your opponent shuffles all Energy from all of their Pokémon into their deck. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your TAG TEAM is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Rowlet & Alolan Exeggutor-GX
Effects: Search your deck for a card that evolves from 1 of your [G] Pokémon and put it onto that Pokémon to evolve it. If that Pokémon is now a Stage 1 Pokémon, search your deck for a Stage 2 Pokémon that evolves from that Pokémon and put it onto that Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck.
Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

If this Pokémon has at least 3 extra Energy attached to it (in addition to this attack's cost), your opponent shuffles all Energy from all of their Pokémon into their deck. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your TAG TEAM is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Heatran-GX
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, when this Pokémon moves from your Bench to become your Active Pokémon, you may move any number of [R] Energy from your other Pokémon to it.
Effects: This attack does 50 damage times the amount of [R] Energy attached to this Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Slowpoke & Psyduck-GX
Effects: Discard any number of Supporter cards from your hand. This attack does 40 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 100 more damage. If this Pokémon has at least 6 extra [W] Energy attached to it (in addition to this attack's cost), flip 10 coins instead, and this attack does 100 more damage for each heads. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your TAG TEAM is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Slowpoke & Psyduck-GX
Effects: Discard any number of Supporter cards from your hand. This attack does 40 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 100 more damage. If this Pokémon has at least 6 extra [W] Energy attached to it (in addition to this attack's cost), flip 10 coins instead, and this attack does 100 more damage for each heads. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your TAG TEAM is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Keldeo-GX
Ability-Effect: Prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon by your opponent's Pokémon-GX or Pokémon-EX.
Effects: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.
This attack does 50 damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Raichu & Alolan Raichu-GX
Effects: If this Pokémon was on the Bench and became your Active Pokémon this turn, this attack does 80 more damage, and your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra [L] Energy attached to it (in addition to this attack's cost), this attack does 100 more damage. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your TAG TEAM is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Raichu & Alolan Raichu-GX
Effects: If this Pokémon was on the Bench and became your Active Pokémon this turn, this attack does 80 more damage, and your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra [L] Energy attached to it (in addition to this attack's cost), this attack does 100 more damage. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your TAG TEAM is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Mewtwo & Mew-GX
Ability-Effect: This Pokémon can use the attacks of any Pokémon-GX or Pokémon-EX on your Bench or in your discard pile. (You still need the necessary Energy to use each attack.)
Effects: If this Pokémon has at least 1 extra Energy attached to it (in addition to this attack's cost), heal all damage from all of your Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your TAG TEAM is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Latios-GX
Ability-Effect: If you have 4 or fewer Pokémon in play, this Pokémon can't attack.
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from TAG TEAM Pokémon.
For the rest of this game, your opponent can't use any GX attacks. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Aerodactyl-GX
Ability-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon, your opponent's Basic Pokémon's attacks cost [C] more.
Effects: This attack does 50 damage times the amount of Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Mega Sableye & Tyranitar-GX
Effects: If your opponent's Pokémon-GX or Pokémon-EX is Knocked Out by damage from this attack, take 1 more Prize card.
If this Pokémon has at least 5 extra Energy attached to it (in addition to this attack's cost), discard the top 15 cards of your opponent's deck. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Mega Sableye & Tyranitar-GX
Effects: If your opponent's Pokémon-GX or Pokémon-EX is Knocked Out by damage from this attack, take 1 more Prize card.
If this Pokémon has at least 5 extra Energy attached to it (in addition to this attack's cost), discard the top 15 cards of your opponent's deck. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Mawile-GX
Ability-Effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may have your opponent reveal their hand and put any number of Basic Pokémon you find there onto their Bench.
Effects: This attack does 30 more damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.
Your opponent reveals their hand. Discard all Supporter cards you find there. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Garchomp & Giratina-GX
Effects: This attack does 40 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
If your opponent's Active Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 80 more damage.

Discard 1 of your opponent's Pokémon and all cards attached to it. If this Pokémon has at least 3 extra [F] Energy attached to it (in addition to this attack's cost), discard 2 of your opponent's Pokémon instead. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your TAG TEAM is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Dragonite-GX
Effects: Discard 3 Energy from this Pokémon.
You may discard any number of cards from your hand until you have 9 or fewer. Draw cards until you have 10 cards in your hand. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Naganadel-GX
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may discard an Ultra Beast card from your hand. If you do, draw 3 cards.
Effects: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 170 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
Add a card from your opponent's discard pile to their Prize cards face down. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Blue's Tactics
Description: At the end of this turn, draw cards until you have 8 cards in your hand.

Name: Channeler
Description: Remove all effects of attacks on you and each of your Pokémon.
